channel.title: Ger on LRG
channel.description: Recent content in Ger on LRG

item.title: Tweet - 486616199623872513
item.description:
The first game of the world cup that I choose to watch, and it had to be #bra vs #ger. Frickin’ hilarious!

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0

item.title: Tweet - 486626906419503107
item.description:
#ger bring on the manager’s baby son too give him a crack at goal. Followed by his 90-yr old grandfather. They score 3.

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0

item.title: Tweet - 486624782860156928
item.description:
Looked away for a second, and there’s another German goal. No matter, there’ll be another along in a minute. #bra #ger

❤️ 0 | 🔃 0
